; Persistent tap-to-turn patch for exact supported builds.

AFFECT /qml/device/view/documentview/SceneViewGestures.qml
    TRAVERSE TouchArea#touchArea
        LOCATE BEFORE TouchAreaClickFilter#touchClick
        INSERT {
            function rmtoolTapPageDirection(pos) {
                if (touchArea.gesturesBlocked
                    || !view.clickGestureEnabled
                    || view.zoomedIn
                    || view.zoomedOut
                    || view.notePage
                    || view.textMode
                    || view.itemSelectionMode
                    || view.textSelectionMode
                    || !view.document
                    || (view.document.fileType !== Document.Pdf
                        && view.document.fileType !== Document.Ebook)) {
                    return 0
                }

                const normalizedX = pos.x / touchArea.width
                const normalizedY = pos.y / touchArea.height

                if (normalizedX < 0.40
                    && normalizedY >= 0.38
                    && normalizedY < 0.65) {
                    return -1
                }

                if ((normalizedX >= 0.75 && normalizedY < 0.65)
                    || normalizedY >= 0.65) {
                    return 1
                }

                return 0
            }

            Component.onCompleted: console.warn("RMTOOL-TAP-PAGE: loaded")
        }

        TRAVERSE TouchAreaClickFilter#touchClick
            REBUILD onClick
                LOCATE AFTER STREAM / { /
                INSERT {
                    const rmtoolDirection = touchArea.rmtoolTapPageDirection(pos)
                    if (!linkPressed && rmtoolDirection < 0) {
                        console.warn("RMTOOL-TAP-PAGE: previous")
                        reset()
                        view.moveBackward()
                        return
                    }
                    if (!linkPressed && rmtoolDirection > 0) {
                        console.warn("RMTOOL-TAP-PAGE: next")
                        reset()
                        view.moveForward()
                        return
                    }
                }
            END REBUILD
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
